title: Pakua Mirror - Convex Reflection for Negative Energy Protection
shortDescription: Pakua Mirror ghar ke bahar se aane wali negative energy, nazar dosh aur vastu dosh ko reflect back karne ke liye ek powerful protection remedy hai.
description:
Pakua Mirror - Convex Reflection for Negative Energy Protection

Pakua Mirror (jise Bagua Mirror bhi kaha jaata hai) ek highly powerful aur traditional Vastu aur Feng Shui remedy hai. Yeh mirror ghar ya office ke main entrance par lagaya jaata hai taaki bahar se aane wali kisi bhi tarah ki negative energy, evil eye (nazar dosh) ya sharp corners se aane wali 'Sha Chi' (bad energy) ko reflect back kiya ja sake. Isme bane huye sacred trigrams aur convex mirror space ko protect karne aur positive energy flow ko maintain rakhne mein behad asardar maane jaate hain.

Key Features

  • Premium Wood and Brass Framing
  • Size: 15 x 15 cm — Standard Outdoor Wall Hanging
  • Convex Glass Mirror — Maximum Reflection Frequency
  • Traditional Eight Trigrams (Bagua) Design
  • Weather-Resistant Materials for Longevity

Benefits

  • Ghar aur office ko negative energies aur evil eye se protect karta hai
  • Main door ke samne ke Vastu dosh (jaise road hit ya pillar) ko neutralize karta hai
  • Family members ke liye security aur peace of mind create karta hai
  • Bahar se aane wali harmful energy ko wapas bhej deta hai
  • Ghar ke atmosphere ko balanced aur safe banaye rakhta hai

Ideal For

  • Main Entrance and Front Doors
  • Homes Facing T-Junctions or Sharp Corners
  • Offices facing heavy traffic or construction
  • Vastu Dosh correction without structural changes

How to Use

Pakua Mirror ko hamesha ghar ke BAHAR (Main Door ke upar) lagayein. Ise kabhi bhi ghar ke andar nahi lagana chahiye. Iska mukh hamesha bahar ki taraf hona chahiye taaki aane wali negative energy isme reflect ho sake. Ise aankhon ke level se thoda upar hang karna sabse best mana jaata hai.
benefits: Protects home and office from negative energies and evil eye
Neutralizes Vastu dosh caused by external obstructions or road hits
Creates a sense of security and peace for family members
Reflects back harmful energies effectively before entering the space
Maintains a balanced and safe atmospheric energy at the entrance
